title: Trebinje, Republika Srpska — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Trebinje, Republika Srpska: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Trebinje is a city in Republika Srpska with a population of 65,000. A city in southern Herzegovina on the Trebišnjica River, known for its Mediterranean climate, the Arslanagić Bridge, and the Hercegovačka Gračanica monastery.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
